reviews.comment:
Esta empresa se olvidó del servicio al cliente no tienen máquina de agua caliente gratuita como en todas otra sucursales de bs as
Obvio q pregunte por el agua Caliente y tenia un costo de 1000 pesos
Teóricamente es la central es la del ejemplo a seguir
Ni la de Bariloche cobra el agua está si
Bueno la atención del personal es acorde a su estación
Ojalá el encargado lea esto

(Translated by Google)
This company has forgotten about customer service; they don't have a free hot water machine like all the other branches in Buenos Aires.
Of course, I asked about hot water, and it cost 1000 pesos.
Theoretically, this is the main branch, the one they're supposed to follow. Even the one in Bariloche doesn't charge for water.
Well, the staff's service is in line with their station.
I hope the manager reads this.

reviewReply.comment:
El agua caliente gratuita no está en ninguna estación 
Solo es gratuita para sicios del ACA 
GRACIAS

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VNNm96b2pxeVlMRUd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Jueves en la noche (no era feriado o vísperas) más de 20 minutos para cargar combustible, fila enorme de vehículos esperando. Un solo baño y te lo tiene que abrir el único playero que tienen atendiendo, las instalaciones estaban roñosas directamente, solo dos surtidores en servicio y como frutilla del postre al querer pagar con la app YPF casualmente no funcionaba. Pensé al ser una estación de servicio emblemática el servicio sería genial, pero la verdad...de 4ta. Te recomiendo ir a otra YPF, a no ser que quieras perder tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
Thursday night (it wasn't a holiday or the day before), it took over 20 minutes to fill up, with a huge line of cars waiting. There was only one bathroom, and the only attendant on duty had to open it for you. The facilities were downright filthy, only two pumps were working, and to top it all off, the YPF app conveniently wasn't working when I tried to pay. I thought that, being a flagship station, the service would be great, but honestly...it was terrible. I recommend going to another YPF station unless you want to waste your time.

reviewReply.comment: Disculpas de  noche se reduce el personal que atiende por obvias razones gracias
